creator: hag@linnaean.org
text:
> From: "Timur I. Bakeyev" <timur@FreeBSD.org>
 > Date: Thu, 30 May 2013 00:22:09 +0200
 >
 > You are not the first one, who reports this problem. But I can't reproduce
 > it - in my environment everything installs correctly into the non-standard
 > prefix.
 >
 > I'm pretty sure that there is subtle difference that makes such a big
 > change, but can't' spot it.
 >
 > As for the LOCALBASE - it's basically incorrect to pass it during the build
 > stage, only PREFIX should be used. LOCALBASE is for installed software only.
 >
 > Do you use some specific build environment, like poudriere or tinderbox?
 > Cause I use just plain FreeBSD installation for testing.

    For what I'm doing, LOCALBASE appears correct.  Every package on
the system is going there, not just the samba stuff.  PREFIX defaults
to LOCALBASE if not expressly set.  Obviously, the patch should use
PREFIX.

    I'm not doing anything at all special for reproduction.  Unpack
amd64 9.1-RELEASE-p2 into a clean jail, stock ports tree at svn
r313265, "cd /usr/ports/devel/talloc && make install
LOCALBASE=/usr/packages"

resulting in:

# ls -lR /usr/local/
total 34
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  4 Jun  1 14:31 include
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel  7 Jun  1 14:31 lib

/usr/local/include:
total 138
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   1987 Apr 11  2012 pytalloc.h
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  61751 Nov 30  2012 talloc.h

/usr/local/lib:
total 173
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     21 Jun  1 14:31 libpytalloc-util.so -> libpytalloc-util.so.2
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   9804 Jun  1 14:31 libpytalloc-util.so.2
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     14 Jun  1 14:31 libtalloc.so -> libtalloc.so.2
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  62913 Jun  1 14:31 libtalloc.so.2
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel      3 Jun  1 14:31 python2.7

/usr/local/lib/python2.7:
total 17
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  3 Jun  1 14:31 site-packages

/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages:
total 25
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  10434 Jun  1 14:31 talloc.so

    This was a fresh jail, so neither /usr/packages nor /usr/local had
anything in them at the start.  Talloc's dependencies all landed in
/usr/packages.
